gzip/GzipFile/name.name: name
gzip/GzipFile/name.description: The path to the gzip file on disk, as a str or bytes. Equivalent to the output of os.fspath() on the original input path, with no other normalization, resolution or expansion.

info.excerpt: The path to the gzip file on disk, as a str or bytes. Equivalent to the output of os.fspath() on the original input path, with no other normalization, resolution or expansion.
